title: 0.0.0 Foundations
description: Doctrine, ontology, graph grammar, narrative bible, and instrumentation schema.

title: 0.0.1 Content Annotation Prototype
description: Manual annotation flow for transforming raw driving questions into internal game content.

title: 0.0.2 Pure Combat Prototype
description: Question-as-attack combat loop with HP, damage, tension, and retries.

title: 0.0.3 Pacing Prototype
description: Deterministic pacing state machine for flow, pressure, danger, recovery, clutch, and repair.

title: 0.0.4 Memory Palace Prototype
description: First map region, place-linked concepts, flashbacks, and reclaim flow.

title: 0.0.5 Narrative Vertical Slice
description: Road Master framing, mentor voice, first region identity, and boss ritual.

title: 0.0.6 Integrated Vertical Slice
description: One playable region that integrates map, combat, pacing, flashback, and narrative.

title: 0.0.7 Telemetry And Balancing
description: Telemetry, dashboards or queries, and evidence-based balancing of the vertical slice.

title: 0.0.8 Content Production Pass
description: Reusable workflow, templates, and QA rules for manual content scaling.

title: 0.0.9 MVP Hardening
description: Onboarding, persistence, first-time-user path, and MVP feature freeze.

title: 0.1.0 MVP
description: Road Master: Crossing Fields Chapter I as a polished public or beta thesis proof.

title: 0.2.0 More Content
description: Expand breadth with more regions, bosses, concepts, and trap families.

title: 0.3.0 Combat Depth
description: Richer game loop with shields, mini-bosses, parry, combo, and reconquest.

title: 0.4.0 Pedagogy Depth
description: Smarter repair systems, better explanations, and anti-trap learning without softening the loop.

title: 0.5.0 Memory Palace Expansion
description: Recursive submaps, stronger landmarks, route memory cues, and cross-region callbacks.

title: 0.6.0 Personalization
description: Player-type adaptation, route estimation, and pacing tuned per user without losing fairness.

title: 0.7.0 Social Layer
description: Selective social and shareable features that strengthen identity without distorting the core loop.

title: 0.8.0 Predictive And B2B
description: Readiness scoring, fail-risk modeling, cohort analytics, and an institutional wedge.

title: 0.9.0 Product Hardening
description: Performance, onboarding optimization, monetization, tuning, QA, and consistency passes.

title: 1.0.0 Full Product
description: Coherent full product with durable loops, broad curriculum coverage, and institution-ready analytics.
